en: Press SPACE or ENTER to continue
zh: 按空格或回车键以继续

en: Edit the list of stratagems able to appear.
zh: 编辑可出现的战备的列表

en: High score won't record while the count of stratagems enabled is less than 16.
zh: 启用的战备数量少于16个时不会记录成绩

en: Arrows won't be shown, used to practice your memory.
zh: 不会显示箭头，用于练习记忆和盲打

en: Continuous irregular arrows, used to practice real-time react ability.
zh: 连续的、无规律的无尽箭头序列，用于练习即时反应能力

en: Clear all stratagems to beat a round, used to practice overall proficiency.
zh: 完成屏幕上的所有战备以通关一回合，用于练习综合熟练度

en: Simulate terminal sequences, used to practice terminal operating skill.
zh: 模拟终端上的随机长序列，用于练习输终端的技术

en: Game over when just wrong once.
zh: 只要按错一次就游戏结束

en: Adjust which stratagems are able to appear in game.
zh: 设置游戏中能够出现哪些战备
时间耗尽 游戏结束
时间耗尽 游戏结束
